name: system-info
tagline: Runs two bundled scripts to report basic OS/Python/time info and list a directory's contents.
verdict: Minimal, low-risk utility skill with no security concerns. Very thin on quality signals: the description says what it does but never when to use it, and neither script's output shape nor failure behavior is spelled out.

highlights.summary: Description says what it does ('Get system information using executable scripts') but never states when to use it.
